meta.title: StudAI — AI math tutor
meta.description: A calm, patient AI math tutor that teaches at your own pace.

auth.title: Sign in to continue
auth.description: Early access to the AI math tutor prototype.

status.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to confirm it.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Your past conversations with the AI tutor will appear here.
sessions.createError: Could not create a new session.
sessions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session? The conversation will be lost.
sessions.emptyDescription: Start a new conversation with the button above — ask anything about math.

chat.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.emptyDescription: Ask anything about math — algebra, geometry, functions, anything.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Tell the AI a bit about yourself. The more you share, the better it can adapt to you. Everything is optional.
settings.displayNameHelp: How the AI will address you.
settings.interestsHelp: Used to make examples more relatable.
settings.learningGoalsPlaceholder: e.g. preparing for university entrance exams
settings.notesPlaceholder: Anything you'd like the AI to keep in mind
settings.shareProgressHelp: Off by default. When on, a linked parent can see what topics you've worked on. (Parent dashboard arrives in a later release.)

onboarding.title: Let's get to know you
onboarding.description: Three quick questions so the tutor can adapt to you. Takes about a minute.
onboarding.errorSaving: Could not save your answers. Try again.
onboarding.errorLoading: Could not load this step. Try again.

personality.title: How do you like to learn?

q1.prompt: When you're stuck on a problem, what helps most?
q1.figureOut: Let me figure it out myself

q2.anxious: Hard, I get a bit anxious

q3.prompt: What kind of problems do you like best?

placement.title: Quick check (optional)
placement.intro: Five problems so the tutor can see roughly where you are. There's no grade — just answer your best, or skip.
placement.answerPlaceholder: Type your answer (or 'skip' if you don't know)
placement.completedBody: Thanks — the tutor is now calibrated to you. You can revisit the quick check from Settings any time.
placement.alreadyCompleted: You've already done the quick check. You can re-take it later if you want.

complete.title: You're all set
complete.description: Anything you've shared is in Settings, where you can edit it any time.

footer.soon: StudAI will soon do more — sessions, settings, and a calm, patient AI math tutor.
